subtypes.name: Rate_Bits_Number
subtypes.code: subtype Rate_Bits_Number is Positive range Min_Padding_Bits + 1 .. State_Size_Bits - 1;

subprograms.name: Rate_Of
subprograms.code: function Rate_Of (Ctx : in Context) return Rate_Bits_Number
